beer.beer_description:
Our second Decoction mash (well at least the second one that we’ve openly advertised) is also our second Marzen. A style traditionally brewed in the winter months of the Northern Hemisphere so we decided to brew it in Summer because as Boogie, one of our brewers, says “time is just a construct, and, I mean, I didn’t agree to it.”

Our longest lagered beer to date is also designed to be the easiest to drink and built for lazy summer sessions. The use of “Mountain Culture Pilsner” under-modified malted barley from Voyager Craft Malt and three types of Munich Malt provide a complex yet smooth malt backbone that glows the colour Autumn sunsets and balances the assertive and full character Pilsen yeast.

Our second Decoction mash (well at least the second one that we’ve openly advertised) is also our second Marzen. items.badge_description: The leaves are changing color, which means it's that magical time of year full of festivals, sausages, and of course, plenty of bubbly brews! Enjoy your Oktoberfest and don't forget your lederhosen. That's 25 different beers with the style of Festbier or Märzen. Try 5 more for Level 6!

items.badge_description: Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 440 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 89!

items.badge_description: Happy Untappd anniversary to you! Thanks for sticking around and drinking socially with us. Cheers! That's 15 years on Untappd!

Looking for more kick than a session beer, but want to be able to stay for a few rounds? You have to keep it in the middle. That's 200 beers with an ABV greater than 5% and less than 10%. Try 5 more for Level 41!

items.checkin_comment: 2nd Release! Soft noble hop aroma. Light, sweet, clean & malt driven. Super easy drinking. Very sessional!

user.bio: "Reality is an illusion caused by a lack of good beer". Instagram/Snapchat:  @cintiamazer
Tag me and I'll tag you back!
Travel for both business and pleasure. Very fortunate to have had some amazing beers around the world.

"I like beer, Motörhead, my two cats and maybe 3 or 4 people."

Untappd badge collector.

Labour Delenda Est.

items.badge_description: While spontaneity can be fun, sometimes you want to make sure your adventure will rock. Checkout the menu at an Untappd Verified Venue before visiting and know exactly what’s on tap! That's 350 check-ins at venue that is verified.  Try 5 more for Level 71!
